# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind evolves: AI assistant upgrades and Code Breach visuals collide with learning
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's upgraded AI assistant capabilities alongside the cyberpunk Code Breach visuals to highlight integrated learning, problem-solving help, and immersive gameplay.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-redesign
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now blends Azure OpenAI-powered AI guidance with a visually redesigned Code Breach tower-defense world, reinforcing hands-on learning, real-time feedback, and engaging problem-solving in one platform.
- CTA: Try the updated CodeGrind now: sign in to experience AI-assisted problem solving and the refreshed Code Breach visuals.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style image featuring the redesigned Code Breach cyberpunk aesthetic on one side, with a subtle overlay of AI chat guidance UI and sample problem prompts, in CodeGrind branding colors. Include a captioned banner reading 'AI-assisted learning meets cyberpunk gameplay.'

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
